---
title: "Baseball Props Dashboard"
toc: false
---

## Purpose

This site will be a daily MLB betting research dashboard built in R and Quarto. It will compare modeled probabilities with available sportsbook prices, surface only picks that clear defined value thresholds, and preserve an honest record of every recommendation.

## Initial Scope

- Pitcher strikeout props
- Batter total bases props
- Daily price snapshots and pick tracking
- Model performance and data-health reporting

The site is currently in setup mode. Model output and live lines will appear only after the data provider and scoring pipeline have been validated.

## Approach

Recommendations will be evaluated against the line and price captured at prediction time. Performance will be reported using units and return on investment, not only win rate.
